arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Manchester City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest host Manchester City in a crucial clash at the City Ground this lunchtime. Nuno Espirito Santo’s side welcome the Premier League champions to Trentside, aiming to continue their push for Champions League qualification. Among the pre-season favourites for relegation, Forest are flying high in third.
